18th IIFA awards will held York this year over 14-15 July (15, 16th July, India time).
days will grand celebration Indian cinema artists have contributed taking Hindi cinema beyond realm nation.
awards will held MetLife stadium, heart York.

Rahman will joined Diljit Dosanjh, Benny Dayal, Javed Ali, Neeti Mohan, Jonita Gandhi Haricharan Seshadri never-seen-before musical medley.
IIFA awards will star-studded event with some epic performances Bollywood celebrities.
This year there will some performances Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif, Alia Bhatt, Shahid Kapoor, Sushant Singh Rajput Kriti Sanon, among others.
Alia Bhatt, Salman Khan Katrina Kaif addressing press IIFA conference.
Image from Twitter.
Since IIFA awards known mixed dance, drama comedy, this year Varun Dhawan, Karan Johar Saif Khan have been roped host main awards.
will watch Dhawan, with impeccable comic timing, match Saif's eloquence Johar's spot-on sarcasm.
Varun Dhawan, Saif Khan Karan Johar IIFA press conference Mumbai.
During press conference, Johar said that Saif have started working script already.
"The script never final till last day, therefore there going improvisation," added.
Apart from hosting night, Dhawan will also performing some father, filmmaker David Dhawan's songs.
Varun earlier mentioned that performance will tribute father, been making films past years.
Varun currently shooting Judwaa with Jacqueline Fernandez Taapsee Pannu.
revealed that songs from film titiled 'Oonchi Building' will launched IIFA stage.
song remake 1997 original starring Karishma Kapoor Salman Khan.
front-runner films race this year Neerja, Mushkil, Pink Kapoor Sons.

Earlier this month, childhood dream became reality when privilege attending Spanish Grand Prix Barcelona.
Thanks Shell Scuderia Ferrari, invited exclusive guest given behind scenes tour into secret world Formula
Little know that ordinary grandstand seats, very exclusive entries world Ferrari Formula Paddock Club, venue where teams partners entertain their guests clients.
This first Grand Prix experience.
arrival, couldn't help feeling like movie star while walking down carpet towards entrance Formula Paddock Club.
Ferrari Enzo nestled amongst other supercars park.
Enzo limited edition sports which only were produced worldwide.
park looked like wealth.
Every type supercar imaginable there owned driven wealthy guests attendance.
minute entered Paddock Club totally amazed.
folks were standing balcony watching live action, they were lazing around white designer leather couches, sipping premium champagne while catching action screens.
just sample some exquisite cuisine decided butter chicken dish that this world.
service 5-star from start finish there were waiters walking around with trays Champagne, tasty snacks other beverages ensure always comfy well looked after.
There even simulator room that could your hand racing around virtual track yourself.
Even though were under cover, Spanish baking down, decided give cream try.
filled with Italian flavours settled raisin cream cool taste buds going.
those with sweet tooth, cream also abundance sweets, candy floss, macaroons many other mouth-watering treats.
Shortly before main race, were taken tour Ferrari's garage Shell's Trackside Laboratory.
Shell only develops fuel lubricants Scuderia Ferrari, also provides racing team with full analytical service every race, using cutting-edge technology expertise.
Every time Ferrari returns pits, Shell scientists take samples Shell Trackside Laboratory.
They conduct more than tests weekend Shell race products used cars, ensure that drivers will able peak performance times.
I've heard people that 2014 cars with their turbo engines don't sound very impressive.
That watching they pretty darn amazing when standing trackside.
goose bumps almost every time they blasted past down start finish line.
They certainly have different tone, beautiful one.
While standing balcony, able look directly over Ferrari lane catch front action.
feel roaring engines they enter exit lane amazed fast pit-stops happened.
turn away second, will miss it's extremely fast.
After spending some time balcony decided grab comfy seat watch action huge television screens strategically placed easy viewing.
They cover action track, well live timing screens used teams their walls.
certainly perfect experience thrills spills racing lavish luxury style.
Walking around rest Paddock Club area, there good chance will bump into some famous faces racing.
While heading downstairs tour Ferrari team garage, walked past Sebastian Vettel, Lewis Hamilton Fernando Alonso.
highlight Kimi Raikkonen popping Ferrari suite having short chat with before race.
Ferrari's Fernando Alonso played second fiddle two-stopping Ferrari teammate Raikkonen much race.
Spaniard passed Finn with three laps sixth place very distant Hamilton's Mercedes 87.7s ahead, even lapped seventh-placed Raikkonen.
Even closest television coverage cannot compare with amazing "celebrity like" experience Formula Grand Prix Paddock Club.
really blew away experience I'll remember forever.
Thank Shell.
